articles.title: Only twice have Inter failed to score in this championship: Allegri has a hand
articles.summary: In this season in which Inter is the best attack in the Serie A championship, the Nerazzurri have only failed to find the goal on two occasions: in the first leg of the Derby (0-1, Pulisic) and in the return match (1-0, Estupinan).

articles.title: Milan at 60 points after 28 days. Last year there were 63 in the entire championship
